LanguageData.FCP_Meme_NCRDeserters.description: Once loyal to the New California Republic, these individuals have turned their backs on the 老旧 world order. Disillusioned by corruption and endless war, they now value survival, independence, and camaraderie above all else. They are wary of authority, skeptical of grand ideals, and quick to defend their own. Their code is one of mutual aid, hard-earned trust, and doing what it takes to survive in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_NCRDeserters.label: NCR 逃兵
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_OldWorldBlues.description: The New California Republic (NCR) is a federal presidential republic founded in New California, comprised of five contiguous states and additional territorial h老旧ings in Nevada and Baja California. The NCR emphasizes and strives to support a myriad of 老旧 world values, such as democracy, personal liberty, and the rule of law. It also aims to restore general order to the wasteland, the improvement and development of infrastructure and economic systems, and overarching peace between people. Similar to institutions of the 老旧 world it seeks to emulate, continued expansion has created challenges with territorial control, loyalty, and corruption that plague the Republic and serve to hinder its goals.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_OldWorldBlues.label: 老旧 World Blues
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Rangers.description: 游骑兵是一支志愿特种部队，因其专业侦察能力、勇敢和战斗能力而闻名，其主要目的是应对共和国常备军无法应对的威胁，以及在 NCR 领土边界周围进行一般维和、侦察已知和潜在威胁以及执行其他特殊任务。他们先进的训练、武器装备以及战前和战后的技术组合常常使他们能够成为共和国冲突中取得胜利的关键，即使在情况下他们可能在数量和武器上处于劣势。
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Rangers.label: NCR流浪者队
